creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Unfortunately BIND 9.3.x has reached EOL so even if we can find 
a definite bug here it is not going to get fixed. 

If you can still see this behavior in 9.4.x (RELENG_7) or 9.6.x 
(RELENG_8) then please follow up _first_ on the bind-users@isc.org 
mailing list because our versions of BIND are unchanged. If a 
problem and/or solution is identified please open a new PR. 

Thanks, 

Doug
